name: philosophers-toolkit
description: Philosophical thinking frameworks for problem clarification and deeper reasoning.

interface.shortDescription: Philosophical thinking frameworks for sharper reasoning
interface.longDescription: Apply classic and Eastern thinking frameworks to clarify problems and reason more deeply — Aristotle's first principles and four causes, Socratic questioning, Hegelian dialectics, Cartesian doubt, Popper falsifiability, plus kaizen, hansei, ikigai, wabi-sabi, and shu-ha-ri. Use them to interrogate assumptions, decompose a tangled problem, or stress-test a conclusion before committing.
defaultPrompt: Help me reason through this decision from first principles.
Use the Socratic method to challenge my assumptions here.
Apply Popper falsifiability to test whether this claim holds up.
